original text:
Today would like talk about another unique embroidery tradition Dnister corridor, This river separates historic districts Pokuttia Podillia.
This region incredibly rich embroidery techniques.
This technique mostly known being used ends ancient woman's headpiece, peremitka, which long narrow piece linen which wound around head neck married women.
ends this garment were always decorated either with woven design with embroidery.
These ornemented ends were called 'zabir'.
edges were sometimes also ornamented, usually with simple woven designs.
Here some women Horoden'ka district costume wearing peremitky.
This type embroidery used women's chemises well, lasted longest zabory because could made look almost same both sides.
image article good example this technique, even though photo somewhat washed out.
will using several images which rather poor quality, apologize that able find better.
framework these designs laid black cross stich, sometimes stem stich.
zabir, double sided cross stitch used.
Then colors were filled with herringbone pine type stitch, which started from center line outlined area extended diagonally outer edge.
This often executed silk thread, sometimes metallic thread accent..Some outlines, often decorative elements edge design were done with Holbein stitch.Other stitches were used edging, including buttonhole chain stitch.
Elements which equilateral looking almost like eyelets, they pulled open.
primary colors used dark reds, edging into maroon purple with other colors used accents.
Some designs stem stitch instead cross stitch, curvilinear.
filling done same however.
Many designs symmetrical about diagonal axis, which similar embroidery designs Balkans.
course, wherever creative embroiderers existed, variations technique also existed.
More recently, this technique, with many others, imitated with cross-stitch.
Here shoulder insets from women's chemises with same design, done rozchokhy, other cross stitch.
another pair, from zabory.
fact, belief that many designs this area with strong black outlines individual motifs which today only found cross stitch were originally executed rozchokha.
would interesting reverse engineer these designs.
suppose should mention that some these designs were deliberately left unfinished more clearly show structure.
Occasionally will remnant rozchokha cross stitch design.
This technique today been revived, being taught places like Uchylyshche L'viw.
designs using technique also being invented.
such piece personal collection, borrowed never returned.
This beautiful part creative heritage Ukraine world, would encourage This technique great deal potential.
Thank reading.
will close with some more images pieces done this technique.
Hello, Roman.
Thanks this post!
thought, that Pokuttya peremitkas mainly woven (like this from Jaseniv-Pilny your post opened eyes wonderful local version embroidered peremitkas.
don't have Iryna Svyontek's book, you, there book this embroidery?
way, "some women Horoden'ka district costume wearing peremitky" folk band "Peremitka" from village Luka, Horodenka raion watch their performance youtube
Thank you, Nawko, would like know where could find other books.
have found them available here.
does show this embroidery, save enlarge black white images able done.It pretty cross stitch outline stitch, filling with herringbone sosnytsia.
Most books Ukrainian embroidery cover this, example Diakiw neil.
called plait stitch, peremitkovy show Horodenkovy stib, somesuch.
There description, diagrams 'Podil'ska Narodna Vyshywka Liudmyla
Thank your information.
please know could other books.
Перші присвячені Гуцульщині, одну книжкою (2-гу)(поталанило, привезли іншу найстаршу скановану копію форматі djvu.
Києві видно продажу, видно
бачила, зібрання чорно-білих схем низинкових розводів (переважно).
Нагадують книжку Сороханюк, жаль, гіршої якості.
маєте знати, поліграфічна якість книжок пані Свйонтек покращувалась кожним виданням маєте найкраща, давніші трохи поступаються.
знайшла видавництво, видало трьох книжок, "Нова Зоря", ними можна сконтактувати електронною поштою nz@com.if.ua.
Також, ймовірно, книжки авторки, її контактів нажаль маю.
один коментар українською, усе, хочу, погана англійська дозволить написати (сподіваюсь, мене зрозумієте).


Єдине джерело, містить замальовки "Український народний орнамент" Олени Пчілки, 1876 (починаючи аркуша).
Завдяки вишивальниці Тетяні можемо переглядати видання онлайн Цей альбом містить зразки орнаментів повіту, якого Баранівський район належав, містить конкретики щодо місць побутування кожного окремого узору також мість дуже загальний опис вишивки вирізуванням настилуванням виділення якихось локальних рис.


Її фото можна знайти альбомі іншої вишивальниці, пані Лідії Бебешко, перетворює PM-схеми:
інші зразки, мені вдалось знайти, зібрала дошку Pinterest: (звідти можна потрапити першоджерела, якщо були соціальні медіа).
все.
Pereproshuju shcho vidpyshu latinikamy.
chudovi znymky knyshchi 'Vyshywka Skhidnoho Podillia', pysaly Jevhen Tetiana Prychepi, vydawnytsa 'Rodovid'.
Так, звичайно, читала Ваші статті.
мене зацікавило Житомирське біле шитво, оремий різновид українських вишивок білим білому.
скільки бачу воно якраз мало схоже вінницьке снятинське, більше схоже полтавське, хоча особливостей, якраз перераховувала пунктиками хоча мало бути більше схоже рівненське (сарненський район), туди ближче.
Перепрошую турботу.
majete uvazi Podil'ske vyrizuvannia.
Tak, maju kil'ky fotohrafii tseho takozh.
posylaty jakscho meni daiete adress email.
Interesting exhaustive articles here,thank you!
very modern view things have.
Embroidery Ukraine many other places considered essential.
was, some extent still visible mark your good taste, marriageable are, evidence proper householding skills.
Untill about 1930's, cloth thread embroidered items were made home, hand.
Today exorbitant prices good linen, those days, much more available.
Even when commercial thread began used, never that expensive.
Secondly, these clothes were worn season then discarded, unfortunately today.
Linen extremely durable, embroidered garment could worn decades.
This especially true most extensively embroidered garments which were only worn important occasions, perhaps church Sunday, most.
Everyday clothes would eventually wear out, less embroidery, even then would recycled footcloths, baby swaddling like.
This much done city women untill 1930's when became fashionable have ethnic identity.
woman villages worked family farm, much year agricultural work does leave with great deal free time, excepting only planting time harvest.
Also, most important things that young girls were expected prepare their trousseau; girl considered ready marriage untill proper collection embroidered clothes household linens prepared, often including shirt future spouse.
Women would also embroider shirts their husbands sons.
considered extremely strong protective talisman young into world with shirt embroidered mother.
Embroidery never considered just hobby', formed vital part life.
This completely been lost Ukrainian culture even today.
course, this applies many other peoples well.
Ohh,thank you, Roman; very informative.
Hi.. Great post.
Well have discussed here things about Costume Embroidery your images also looks amazing.
Keep this type posting.
